title: Three Companies Cut Management for AI. Here is the Wall They Hit
description: Flattening management structures has become a growing trend as companies integrate AI to streamline operations and reduce hierarchical bottlenecks. Nate Jones explores this shift by examining the experiences of Kimmy, Block and Meta, three organizations that restructured their management layers with varying degrees of success. title: Iyabo Obasanjo Steps Down as APC Picks Adeola as Ogun Consensus Candidate
description: One of Ogun State governorship aspirants, Iyabo Obasanjo, has suspended her 2027 ambition after the All Progressives Congress (APC) adopted Senator Solomon Adeola as its consensus candidate, signaling an early consolidation of party support ahead of the election.
